summary: Phase 1 corrections testing completed. All major features working correctly: Pipeline (horizontal scroll, drag handles, context menus), Tasks (horizontal scroll, drag handles, Colonnes button, context menus), Demandes (search bar, status filter, summary cards), Facturation (Services button visible), AI Assistant (sidebar historique with conversations, Nouveau button, chat input). Floating AI bubble correctly hidden on /admin/assistant and visible on other admin pages. One bug found: loading individual conversation history fails for old format conversations.

minor.issue: Does not convert old format conversations (user_message/assistant_message) to new format (messages array) like the list endpoint does. Frontend expects messages array but receives old format, causing 'Erreur lors du chargement de la conversation' error.

integration_issues.issue: When clicking on a conversation in sidebar, error toast appears 'Erreur lors du chargement de la conversation'. This is because backend returns old format (user_message/assistant_message) but frontend expects messages array.

action_items: Fix GET /api/ai/conversations/{conversation_id} endpoint to convert old format conversations to new format (add same conversion logic as in get_ai_conversations list endpoint)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py line 3364-3375: get_ai_conversation endpoint returns raw conversation without format conversion. Should apply same old-to-new format conversion as get_ai_conversations (lines 3318-3340)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 corrections mostly working. Pipeline and Tasks pages have horizontal scroll, drag handles (GripVertical icons), and working context menus. Demandes has search, filter, and summary cards. Facturation has Services button. AI Assistant has sidebar with conversation history but loading individual conversations fails for old format data. Floating bubble correctly hidden on /admin/assistant.

pipeline_page.context_menu: PASS - Modifier, Voir détails, Archiver, Supprimer

tasks_page.context_menu: PASS - Modifier, Voir détails, En cours, Terminé, Supprimer
tasks_page.columns: PASS - 3 task columns (À faire, En cours, Terminé)

demandes_page.summary_cards: PASS - Total, Non traité, Contacté, Qualifié, Converti

facturation_page.services_button: PASS - Visible next to Nouveau devis and Nouvelle facture

ai_assistant_page.load_conversation: FAIL - Error loading old format conversations
